system.description: Master the digital pathways. Push into a device’s screen or display and roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
you enter the device. While inside, you become a being of
electricity and data; you may hide within the device, and you may see out of any screen or camera attached to it as if it were a window. In addition, you may emerge from the screen or display of any device directly connected to the original device (by cable, wireless pairing, etc.)
outcomes.eachplus3:
choose one:
  • You may bring someone with you.
  • You may search the files, storage, or circuitry of the device you entered.
outcomes.failure: only your consciousness goes. You are lost in the technology’s many connections and considered dead. This activates your Life Insurance Policy, but your newly data-based self might take on a life of its own.
